name: full-bare-tier
line: [L0001] Pin priors before calibrating | candidate | added: 2026-07-01 | tags: pinning, calibration | lesson: Version-pin empirical priors before building anything margin-calibrated on top of them; an upstream default flip silently rescales downstream thresholds. | evidence: Tonality key-profile default flip changed margin scales for two consumers (INTEGRATIONS.md rule 4). | falsifier: an upstream default flip that leaves all downstream margin-calibrated thresholds unchanged.

parsed.title: Pin priors before calibrating
parsed.lesson: Version-pin empirical priors before building anything margin-calibrated on top of them; an upstream default flip silently rescales downstream thresholds.
parsed.evidence: Tonality key-profile default flip changed margin scales for two consumers (INTEGRATIONS.md rule 4).
parsed.falsifier: an upstream default flip that leaves all downstream margin-calibrated thresholds unchanged.

name: labeled-tier-realworld
note: Dominant form in real LIBRARYs (e.g. Wend L0001): tier carried as a labeled segment 'tier: candidate', not the contract grammar's bare '<tier>'. distillery ROADMAP decision 5 reads this as valid; object here if the contract intends strict-bare.
line: [L0002] Metrics Goodhart hard | tier: candidate | added: 2026-07-07 | tags: measurement | lesson: Optimizing a single listening proxy to its floor destroyed motif audibility; the fix was structural, not a better optimum. | evidence: 2026-07-07 session, leap% 65->8 regression, resolved at 26% (commit ba88509). | falsifier: a metric-driven change that improves its proxy to the floor AND survives listening without structural rework.

parsed.title: Metrics Goodhart hard
parsed.lesson: Optimizing a single listening proxy to its floor destroyed motif audibility; the fix was structural, not a better optimum.
parsed.evidence: 2026-07-07 session, leap% 65->8 regression, resolved at 26% (commit ba88509).
parsed.falsifier: a metric-driven change that improves its proxy to the floor AND survives listening without structural rework.

name: emdash-optional-absent
note: Real LIBRARYs write 'supersedes: —' to mean none. Decision 5 treats —/-/empty OPTIONAL fields as absent. Object here if the contract intends the segment to be omitted entirely instead.
line: [L0003] Em-dash means none | canonical | added: 2026-06-30 | tags: hygiene | lesson: Placeholder em-dash on optional fields is idiomatic and must parse as absent. | evidence: Wend LIBRARY.md uses 'supersedes: —' on every entry. | falsifier: a contract ruling that placeholder-valued optional segments are malformed. | supersedes: —

parsed.title: Em-dash means none
parsed.lesson: Placeholder em-dash on optional fields is idiomatic and must parse as absent.
parsed.evidence: Wend LIBRARY.md uses 'supersedes: —' on every entry.
parsed.falsifier: a contract ruling that placeholder-valued optional segments are malformed.

name: promoted-with-origin-backlinks
line: [L0004] Promoted entry keeps back-links | canonical | added: 2026-07-02 | tags: promotion | origin: wend#L0007, terrane#L0012 | lesson: Parent-scope entries must carry child back-links; provenance is never dropped on promotion. | evidence: audit-loop promotion of wend#L0007 and terrane#L0012 into the shared scope. | falsifier: a ratified promotion policy that permits dropping child origins.

parsed.title: Promoted entry keeps back-links
parsed.lesson: Parent-scope entries must carry child back-links; provenance is never dropped on promotion.
parsed.evidence: audit-loop promotion of wend#L0007 and terrane#L0012 into the shared scope.
parsed.falsifier: a ratified promotion policy that permits dropping child origins.

name: superseding-and-recurred
line: [L0005] Supersede never delete | candidate | added: 2026-07-03 | tags: hygiene | lesson: Invalidate-don't-erase; a superseded entry stays in the file. | evidence: knowledge-loop prompt, supersede rule. | falsifier: a ratified erase-on-supersede policy. | supersedes: L0001 | recurred: 2026-07-05 (wend#L0009)

parsed.title: Supersede never delete
parsed.lesson: Invalidate-don't-erase; a superseded entry stays in the file.

name: missing-falsifier-segment
line: [L0101] No falsifier stated | candidate | added: 2026-07-01 | tags: hygiene | lesson: Entries without falsifiers are unfalsifiable lore. | evidence: this fixture.

name: emdash-required-field
note: Decision 5 scoping: — normalization applies to OPTIONAL fields only; a required field valued — quarantines rather than being silently absent-ed.
line: [L0102] Placeholder on required field | candidate | added: 2026-07-01 | tags: hygiene | lesson: Required fields may not carry placeholders. | evidence: this fixture. | falsifier: —

name: short-id
line: [L12] Short id must quarantine not vanish | candidate | added: 2026-07-01 | tags: hygiene | lesson: Near-miss ids are attempted entries. | evidence: this fixture. | falsifier: contract ruling that near-misses are structural.

name: lowercase-id
line: [l0103] Lowercase id | candidate | added: 2026-07-01 | tags: hygiene | lesson: Lowercase L fails the id pattern. | evidence: this fixture. | falsifier: contract ruling accepting lowercase ids.

name: bad-tier
note: error_contains names the offending token, not prescribed wording — a parser may report this as unknown-tier, unrecognized-segment, or missing-required-tier.
line: [L0104] Unknown tier | experimental | added: 2026-07-01 | tags: hygiene | lesson: Tier must be candidate, canonical, or proliferated. | evidence: this fixture. | falsifier: contract adding a new tier without a version bump.

name: bad-date
line: [L0105] Non-ISO date | candidate | added: 2026-7-1 | tags: hygiene | lesson: Dates are YYYY-MM-DD. | evidence: this fixture. | falsifier: contract relaxing the date shape.

name: empty-tags
line: [L0106] Empty tags | candidate | added: 2026-07-01 | tags: | lesson: tags requires at least one item. | evidence: this fixture. | falsifier: contract permitting tagless entries.

name: bad-origin-backlink
line: [L0107] Malformed back-link | canonical | added: 2026-07-01 | tags: promotion | origin: wend-L0007 | lesson: Back-links are <child>#Lxxxx. | evidence: this fixture. | falsifier: contract relaxing the back-link pattern.
